headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 26, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles in a 17-1 victory, with Garrett Crochet pitching 6.0 innings and allowing 0 earned runs. The Seattle Mariners came from behind to defeat the St. Louis Cardinals 11-9, thanks to Nathan Church's two home runs and four RBIs. The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5-3 win over the Cleveland Guardians, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the offense and Kevin Gausman earning the win.

Several players have been impacted by injuries and availability. The New York Yankees have placed RHP Angel Chivilli on the 15-day injured list due to right shoulder discomfort. The Cincinnati Reds have placed 3B Eugenio Suárez on the 10-day injured list with a mild left oblique strain. The Toronto Blue Jays have placed RF Nathan Lukes on the 10-day injured list with a left hamstring strain and transferred RHP Yimi García to the 60-day injured list. The Chicago Cubs have placed LHP Caleb Thielbar on the 15-day injured list with a left hamstring strain and transferred RHP Porter Hodge to the 60-day injured list. The Tampa Bay Rays have placed RHP Edwin Uceta on the 60-day injured list with right shoulder impingement. The Colorado Rockies have placed RHP Ryan Feltner on the 15-day injured list with right ulnar nerve inflammation.

There have been several trades and roster movements. The Toronto Blue Jays acquired catcher Willie MacIver in a trade with the Texas Rangers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Colorado Rockies traded 3B Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash. The Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rout Orioles 17-1**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox dominated the Baltimore Orioles in a lopsided 17-1 victory. Garrett Crochet led the way on the mound, pitching 6.0 innings with 7 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Mariners Come from Behind to Defeat Cardinals 11-9**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners rallied to secure an 11-9 victory over the St. Louis Cardinals, with Nathan Church leading the charge at the plate. Church hit two home runs and drove in four runs, helping the Mariners secure the win.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Take Down Guardians 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 5-3 win over the Cleveland Guardians, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs. Kevin Gausman earned the win, while Louis Varland notched the save.

top_news.title: **Giants Take Down Marlins in 6-2 Victory**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants secured a 6-2 win over the Miami Marlins, with Casey Schmitt leading the offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs. Robbie Ray pitched 5 strong innings for the Marlins, striking out 4 and allowing 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Yankees Place RHP Angel Chivilli on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees have placed RHP Angel Chivilli on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 23, 2026, due to right shoulder discomfort.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Willie MacIver in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have acquired catcher Willie MacIver in a trade with the Texas Rangers, who received cash in return.
